resource.manifest:
apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: KafkaCluster
metadata:
  name: "{{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['name']}}"
  labels:
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: "{{workflow.name}}"
    workflows.argoproj.io/run-uid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
    strimzi.io/cluster: "{{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['name']}}"
spec:
  dependsOn: []
  version: "{{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['version']}}"
  auth:
    type: "{{=sprig.dig('auth', 'type', 'none', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['config'])}}"
  nodePool:
    replicas: {{=sprig.dig('nodePoolSpecOverrides', 'replicas', 1, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['config'])}}
    roles: {{=sprig.dig('nodePoolSpecOverrides', 'roles', ["controller","broker"], fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['config'])}}
    storage:
      size: "{{=sprig.dig('nodePoolSpecOverrides', 'storage', 'size', '5Gi', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['config'])}}"
      type: "{{=sprig.dig('nodePoolSpecOverrides', 'storage', 'type', 'persistent-claim', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterConfig)['config'])}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.topicCrName}}"
  labels:
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: "{{workflow.name}}"
    workflows.argoproj.io/run-uid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/source: "{{inputs.parameters.sourceLabel}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/kafka-cluster: "{{inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterName}}"
spec:
  dependsOn:
    - "{{inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterName}}"
  kafkaClusterName: "{{inputs.parameters.kafkaClusterName}}"
  topicName: "{{inputs.parameters.kafkaTopicName}}"
  partitions: {{inputs.parameters.partitions}}
  replicas: {{inputs.parameters.replicas}}
  topicConfig: {{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.topicConfig)}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.proxyName}}"
  labels:
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: "{{workflow.name}}"
    workflows.argoproj.io/run-uid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/source: "{{=sprig.dig('sourceConfig', 'label', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig))}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/task: captureProxy
spec: {{=sprig.merge(sprig.dict("dependsOn", [inputs.parameters.topicCrName], "loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap", sprig.dig('loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig']), "internetFacing", sprig.dig('internetFacing', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig']), "podReplicas", sprig.dig('podReplicas', 1, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig']), "resources", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig']['resources'], "tls", sprig.dig('tls', sprig.dict(), fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig'])), sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.proxyConfig)['proxyConfig'], 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'internetFacing', 'podReplicas', 'resources', 'tls'))}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
  labels:
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: "{{workflow.name}}"
    workflows.argoproj.io/run-uid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/source: "{{inputs.parameters.sourceLabel}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/snapshot: "{{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['label']}}"
spec:
  snapshotPrefix: "{{=fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['snapshotPrefix']}}"
  indexAllowlist: {{=sprig.dig('indexAllowlist', [], fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['config'])}}
  maxSnapshotRateMbPerNode: {{=sprig.dig('maxSnapshotRateMbPerNode', 0, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['config'])}}
  jvmArgs: "{{=sprig.dig('jvmArgs', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['config'])}}"
  loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap: "{{=sprig.dig('loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.snapshotItemConfig)['config'])}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: TrafficReplay
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.name}}"
  labels:
    workflows.argoproj.io/workflow: "{{workflow.name}}"
    workflows.argoproj.io/run-uid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/source: "{{inputs.parameters.sourceLabel}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/target: "{{inputs.parameters.targetLabel}}"
    migrations.opensearch.org/task: trafficReplayer
spec: {{=sprig.merge(sprig.dict("dependsOn", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.dependsOn), "jvmArgs", sprig.dig('jvmArgs', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)), "loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap", sprig.dig('loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)), "podReplicas", sprig.dig('podReplicas', 1, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)), "resources", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)['resources'], "transformsImage", sprig.dig('transformsImage', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)), "transformsImagePullPolicy", sprig.dig('transformsImagePullPolicy', 'IfNotPresent', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions)), "transformsConfigMap", sprig.dig('transformsConfigMap', '', fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions))), sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions), 'jvmArgs', 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'podReplicas', 'useLocalStack', 'resources', 'transformsImage', 'transformsImagePullPolicy', 'transformsConfigMap'))}}

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: ApprovalGate
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceApiVersion}}"
kind: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceKind}}"
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
  annotations:
    migrations.opensearch.org/approved-by-run: "{{workflow.uid}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: ApprovalGate
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: KafkaCluster
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshot: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshot}}"
  checksumForReplayer: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForReplayer}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshot: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshot}}"
  checksumForReplayer: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForReplayer}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  snapshotName: "{{inputs.parameters.snapshotName}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForSnapshotMigration: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForSnapshotMigration}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"
  checksumForReplayer: "{{inputs.parameters.checksumForReplayer}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  outputs:
    metadataEvaluate:
      artifactName: "{{inputs.parameters.artifactName}}"
      s3Key: "{{inputs.parameters.s3Key}}"
      resourceUid: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceUid}}"
      workflowName: "{{workflow.name}}"
      workflowUid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
      workflowCreationTimestamp: "{{workflow.creationTimestamp}}"
      configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  outputs:
    metadataMigrate:
      artifactName: "{{inputs.parameters.artifactName}}"
      s3Key: "{{inputs.parameters.s3Key}}"
      resourceUid: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceUid}}"
      workflowName: "{{workflow.name}}"
      workflowUid: "{{workflow.uid}}"
      workflowCreationTimestamp: "{{workflow.creationTimestamp}}"
      configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: TrafficReplay
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
status:
  phase: "{{inputs.parameters.phase}}"
  configChecksum: "{{inputs.parameters.configChecksum}}"

apiVersion: kafka.strimzi.io/v1
kind: Kafka
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: kafka.strimzi.io/v1
kind: Kafka
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CapturedTraffic
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: CaptureProxy
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotMigration
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: DataSnapshot
metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1
kind: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceKind}}"

  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"

apiVersion: migrations.opensearch.org/v1alpha1

metadata:
  name: "{{inputs.parameters.resourceName}}"
